g.title: NPResolution
g.text: TC approves sending to NP ballot?

g.title: WGDevelop
g.text: WG resolves any NP ballot comments
and develops one or more WDs

g.title: Form4
g.text: WG prepares Form 4 and rough draft

g.title: CDConsult
g.text: CM distributes CD to TC for consultation

g.title: DISNotification
g.text: WG notifies TC of impending ballot

g.title: DISResolution
g.text: TC resolves to send to FDIS ballot
